title: Effortless Building: Sophisticated
description: Advanced building QoL mod with mirror/array/shape modes, expanded reach, per-axis placement limits, backpack-based building upgrades, compact HUD counts, and clear missing-item feedback for survival building.
body:
**Sophisticated Building**

High-level: A stability-focused, feature-rich fork of Effortless Building tailored for large-scale survival builds. It delivers streamlined placement modes, reach scaling, upgrade-capped backpack sourcing, clearer HUD, and tighter sync so big projects stay predictable and performant.

[![BisectHosting Game Server](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1563/173/bisecthostingbanner-webp.webp)](https://www.bisecthosting.com/OBCR)

## Highlights

*   **Shape builder**: Pick from lines, walls, floors, cubes, circles, cylinders, spheres, cones, pyramids, diagonals, slopes, and more.
*   **Terraforming (alpha)**: Terrain Mound mode sculpts hills, slopes, plateaus, mountains, or cliffs, with optional noise for natural edges. Marked **alpha**—expect tweaks.
*   **Mirrors & arrays**: Mirror across axes, spin shapes around a center (radial mirror), or repeat with custom offsets.
*   **Smart replace modes**: Air-only, blocks-only, both, or offhand-filtered; optional tile-entity protection and mini previews.
*   **Undo / redo**: Mistakes are reversible.
*   **Material awareness**: Live cost overlay and inventory checks prevent ghost builds.

## Items

*   **Randomizer Bags** (5 / 9 / 27 / 54 slots): store block templates and build with randomized picks from what you actually have. Omega bags support per-slot weights for biased randomness.
*   **Reach Upgrades**: consume to extend your build reach (tiers 1–3).
*   **Compressed Blocks**: crafting mats for the upgrade line.
*   **Building Upgrade (SophisticatedBackpacks)**: slot into a backpack to raise the max blocks you can place at once (tiers 1–4 and Omega). Only one building upgrade per backpack.

## Build Modes (quick list)

*   Single block, Line, Wall (solid/hollow), Floor (solid/outline), Cube (solid/hollow/skeleton), Circle/Cylinder (corner or center start; solid/ring), Sphere (solid/shell), Pyramid, Cone, Diagonal Line/Wall, Slope Floor, Terrain Mound (alpha).

## Modifiers

*   **Mirror** (X/Y/Z planes), **Radial Mirror** (slice around a pivot), **Array** (repeat with offsets). Stack them to multiply results.

## Dependencies

*   Works standalone. The Building Upgrade item needs SophisticatedBackpacks to function (otherwise it’s just a decorative placeholder). effortlessbuilding-sophisticated)

Attribution

*   Original mod and concept: Effortless Building by Requios
*   https://modrinth.com/mod/effortless-building
